settings.heading: What can we make for you?
settings.subheading: Cakes, cookies, cake pops, candy — the whole menu in one place. Tap a card to start your order.

settings.description: Classic 6", 8", and 10" rounds. Sheet cakes. Tiered occasion cakes.
Hand-dipped cake pops in our classic flavors.
Brown sugar, sugar, and seasonal favorites — by the dozen or the half-dozen.
The Cupid Candies tradition — hand-poured meltaways, caramels, turtles, and more.
